news.t: J.P. Morgan Asset Management Launches JPMorgan International Dynamic ETF (JIDE) on NYSE Arca

holdings.infoBox: JIDE is an equity ETF with a total of 103 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 4.40%, Allianz SE at 2.20%, Banco Santander at 2.16%, Nestlé at 2.09%, and BHP Group at 2.01%.

overview.description: The JPMorgan International Dynamic ETF (JIDE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund targeting large- and mid-cap stocks in developed markets outside North America. It aims to offer a dynamic edge by adjusting allocations based on changing markets. JIDE was launched on Jan 27, 2026 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.

data.title: J.P. Morgan Asset Management Launches JPMorgan International Dynamic ETF (JIDE) on NYSE Arca
data.text: New ETF Delivers Active International Equity Strategy for U.S. Investors NEW YORK, Jan. 28, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- J.P. Morgan Asset Management today announced the launch of the JPMorgan International D...
